title: 1.20 Panorama with shaders
body:
So, in a new snapshot for version 1.20 (23w14a) the new panorama was introduced.

**I made a texture pack that adds shaders to the original panorama.**

Work perfectly with my another texture pack — [New Title](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/new-title)

[![Get it on SERVICE](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1fff8955b94a5009fdb10dd280a2783c844dbdbc.png)](https://shorturl.at/27Kvk)
________________


The seed was discovered by the [Minecraft@Home](https://www.youtube.com/@MinecraftAtHome) team.

*  Version: Minecraft Java Snapshot 23w14a (1.19.4 works as well)
*  Seed: 8554477380691140270
*  Coordinates: X=1839.272 Y=128 Z=6312.295
*  Time of day: 23322 ticks

The shaders used are the [Complementary Reimagined](https://www.complementary.dev/reimagined/) Shaders.

The tool used is the [Panorama](https://modrinth.com/mod/swd-panorama) mod

Inspired by [@ItsMemed](https://www.planetminecraft.com/member/itsmemed/) 1.19 Panorama with Shaders
